form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a 0.1 len at this track March 15 over 914m defeating Atomic Drop with 57kg at $2.60. form.formComment: Resuming after a 12 weeks break. Finished off last campaign second in a small field at this track January 17 over 914m, 1.75 len behind Ro Town with 56kg at $6.
